courses.name: Boost Productivity with Gen AI
courses.description: Unlock growth with our Gen AI workshop — gain skills to build models, predict trends, and automate tasks.
learningOutcomes: Understand core ML concepts and workflows
Build and evaluate simple models (classification/regression)
Preprocess data and feature engineering
Use Python libraries (scikit-learn, pandas)
Deploy a basic model and interpret results
courses.targetAudience: Beginners interested in data science, analysts, developers

courses.name: Click Wisely: Everyday Internet Safety
courses.description: Learn essential cybersecurity skills to stay safe online and protect yourself and your organisation from cyber threats.
learningOutcomes: Identify common online threats and scams
Apply basic account and device security best-practices
Secure passwords and use multi-factor authentication
Recognize phishing and social engineering
Safely manage personal and organisational data
courses.targetAudience: General public, small business employees, students

courses.name: AI in Human Resources Management
courses.description: Transform your HR game with our AI in HR workshop — automate hiring, boost engagement, and make smarter decisions with data-driven tools.
learningOutcomes: Learn AI use-cases in recruitment and talent management
Apply automation to streamline HR workflows
Use people analytics to improve engagement
Understand ethical considerations and bias mitigation
Build simple ML prototypes for HR tasks
courses.targetAudience: HR professionals, people managers, HR tech enthusiasts

courses.name: Cybersecurity Essentials
courses.description: Secure your future with our Cybersecurity Course — learn to protect systems, detect threats, and defend against cyber attacks.
learningOutcomes: Understand networking fundamentals and threat models
Perform basic vulnerability assessments
Implement defensive controls and incident response
Harden systems and practice secure configuration
Follow security best-practices for organisations
courses.targetAudience: IT staff, aspiring security analysts, system administrators

courses.name: Digitalisation 101
courses.description: Learn how digitisation can address organisational challenges, and discover ways to enhance competitive advantage.
learningOutcomes: Understand digital transformation strategies
Identify opportunities for process digitisation
Adopt digital tools for collaboration and efficiency
Measure impact and ROI of digital initiatives
Plan small-scale digital projects

courses.name: Bitcoin & Blockchain 101
courses.description: An introduction to Bitcoin and blockchain technology — learn how decentralized systems work, and practical use-cases for business and finance.
learningOutcomes: Explain how blockchain and Bitcoin work at a technical level
Differentiate public, private, and permissioned ledgers
Understand wallets, keys, and transaction basics
Explore real-world blockchain applications and limitations
Assess security and regulatory considerations

courses.name: Big Data Analytics
courses.description: Master the tools and techniques to analyse and visualise large datasets — uncover patterns, trends, and actionable insights from structured and unstructured data.
learningOutcomes: Understand data architecture and storage solutions
Apply statistical methods to analyse large datasets
Visualise data with dashboards and reports
Implement machine learning algorithms for predictive analytics
Evaluate data quality and security measures

courses.name: Principles of E-commerce
courses.description: Master the principles of e-commerce and how to build a successful online business.
learningOutcomes: Understand the basics of e-commerce
Differentiate between B2B and B2C e-commerce
Understand the e-commerce value chain
Apply e-commerce marketing strategies
Evaluate e-commerce security and compliance

courses.name: Beginner Content Creator Bootcamp: TikTok, Mobile Videography, Editing & Personal IP

Mastering Machine Learning: Algorithms & Models for Next-Gen AI Solutions
